programs.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programs.desc: Gordon visits the Hot Potato Café in Fishtown, Philadelphia. With no profit made in its two years of trading and an influential restaurant reviewer dubbing them `Spuddy Hell', Gordon soon realises Hot Potato may have had its chips.

programs.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programs.desc: Nightmares USA: Two co-owners are clashing in - a debt-laden restaurant in Brooklyn. Can Gordon fix their balance sheet? Or is this eatery dead meat?

programs.title: First Dates UK
programs.desc: Can an entrepreneur with a flashy exterior find someone to settle down with.

programs.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programs.desc: LaSalle is determined to prove Cade's innocence when he is named a prime suspect in a Jefferson Parish murder case involving his girlfriend, but finds that the odds are stacked against him as Cade has no recollection of the night in question.

programs.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programs.sub_title: How Much Pain Can You Take?
programs.desc: The elusive Baitfish intentionally takes the life of someone close to the NCIS team in order to get his message across to Pride, which ultimately drives the city to search for the mysterious killer who is responsible for killing several victims.

programs.title: The Rising
programs.desc: Neve wants revenge for herself and others. Pursuing her killer, Neve allows the anger to consume her. Will she succumb to the darkness within?
